contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: dao_protocol: provision production .env secrets for ramp (Edgar extraction item 2)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/204
  
  Details:
  Completed env provisioning (item 2 of the Edgar -> dao_protocol Outstanding checklist) on seni_ror_new. Extracted the canonical runtime config values from the live Rails process (loaded /proc/<pid>/environ for SECRET_KEY_BASE since Rails has no .env, then a rails runner read Rails.application.config.*) and merged 23 DAO_PROTOCOL_* keys into /home/ubuntu/dao_protocol/.env (chmod 600), without ever echoing secret values.
  
  Provisioned: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, GITHUB_PAT, the email-verification GAS webhook url + secret, and 19 webhook URLs for dispatch. The 4 secrets resolve via pydantic Settings; the 19 webhooks load via the systemd EnvironmentFile into the process env for dispatch.py os.environ lookups (verified present in the service MainPID). The two Agroverse inventory-snapshot vars were left empty because no source value exists -- they are unset in prod Rails too, so that worker no-ops on both sides (gate-off safe).
  
  Service restarted and healthy; all gates remain OFF (env-only change, no traffic moved). Implementation + env provisioning are now both complete; only operator-driven gate ramps and PR7 cleanup remain.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
